input.subject: Your SuperShuttle Reservation
input.body_text:
SUPERSHUTTLE
Your Ride to the Airport

Reservation Confirmed!
Confirmation #: SS789456

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
PICK-UP DETAILS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Date: Saturday, February 28, 2026
Time: 5:30 AM

Pick-up Address:
123 Main Street, Apt 4B
San Diego, CA 92101

Destination:
San Diego International Airport (SAN)
Terminal 2

Passengers: 1
Luggage: 2 checked bags

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Driver will call 10-15 minutes before arrival.
Look for the blue SuperShuttle van.

Total: $32.00 (prepaid)

Need changes? Call 1-800-258-3826
or visit supershuttle.com

Have a great trip!
